name: marinara-engine
description: AI Chat & Roleplay Frontend — Conversation, Roleplay, Visual Novel
author: Marianna

scripts.build: pnpm clean:stale-client && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/shared build && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server --filter @marinara-engine/client --parallel run build
scripts.check: pnpm clean:stale-client && pnpm impeccable:check && pnpm lint && pnpm build
scripts.regression: pnpm regression:spatial && pnpm regression:prompt && pnpm regression:timezone && pnpm regression:noodle && pnpm regression:emoji && pnpm regression:providers && pnpm regression:jsonish && pnpm regression:tts && pnpm regression:issues && pnpm regression:roleplay && pnpm regression:sprites && pnpm smoke:ui
scripts.regression:noodle: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-scheduler.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-settings.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-mentions.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-polls.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-prompt.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-deletion.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-image-retry.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/noodle-vision.regression.ts
scripts.regression:issues: pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/open-issues.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/file-backed-shutdown.regression.ts && pnpm --filter @marinara-engine/server exec tsx ../../scripts/regressions/capability-package-lifecycle.regression.ts
